<!-- Target branch is develop, never main. main is cut from develop at release time. -->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. What changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI / tooling
- [ ] Breaking change

## How was it tested?

<!-- Describe the real Docker setup you tested against: which services are
configured (Sonarr, Radarr, SABnzbd, qBittorrent, Plex, Jellyfin, etc.),
what you did in the UI, and what you saw in the logs. "It compiles" is not
a test. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested against a real Docker setup, not mocks
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, API keys, or personal URLs in code or tests
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour, config, or install steps changed
- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format --check` pass locally
- [ ] `npm run test:run` and `npm run build` pass locally
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits
